sentences.target: Je retire mes chaussures à l'entrée.

translations.fr: Je retire mes chaussures à l'entrée.
translations.en: I'm taking off my shoes at the entrance.
translations.es: Me quito los zapatos en la entrada.
translations.de: Ich ziehe meine Schuhe am Eingang aus.
translations.pt: Eu tiro os sapatos na entrada.
translations.vi: Tôi cởi giày ở lối vào.
translations.nl: Ik doe mijn schoenen uit bij de ingang.
translations.hi: मैं प्रवेश द्वार पर अपने जूते उतार रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Βγάζω τα παπούτσια μου στην είσοδο.
translations.nb: Jeg tar av meg skoene ved inngangen.
translations.id: Saya melepas sepatu di pintu masuk.
translations.sv: Jag tar av mig skorna vid ingången.
translations.da: Jeg tager mine sko af ved indgangen.
translations.ja: 入口で靴を脱いでいます。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 1st person singular of the lexical verb ‘retirer’.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular possessor), plural to agree with ‘chaussures’.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of ‘retire’.
Simple preposition introducing a locative complement.
Noun with elided definite article (l’); complement of the preposition ‘à’ (locative).

sentences.target: Tu peux retirer ta commande au comptoir.
sentences.reading: /ty pø ʁətiʁe ta kɔmɑ̃d o kɔ̃twaʁ/

translations.fr: Tu peux retirer ta commande au comptoir.
translations.ipa: /ty pø ʁətiʁe ta kɔmɑ̃d o kɔ̃twaʁ/
translations.en: You can pick up your order at the counter.
translations.es: Puedes recoger tu pedido en el mostrador.
translations.de: Du kannst deine Bestellung an der Theke abholen.
translations.it: Puoi ritirare il tuo ordine al bancone.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以在柜台领取你的订单。
translations.yue: 你可以喺櫃檯攞你嘅訂單。
translations.ru: Ты можешь забрать свой заказ у стойки.
translations.pt: Você pode retirar seu pedido no balcão.
translations.he: אתה יכול לאסוף את ההזמנה שלך בדלפק.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể nhận đơn hàng của mình tại quầy.
translations.nl: Je kunt je bestelling bij de balie ophalen.
translations.uk: Ти можеш забрати своє замовлення на стійці.
translations.hi: तुम अपना ऑर्डर काउंटर से ले सकते हो.
translations.pl: Możesz odebrać swoje zamówienie przy ladzie.
translations.el: Μπορείς να παραλάβεις την παραγγελία σου στον πάγκο.
translations.nb: Du kan hente bestillingen din ved disken.
translations.id: Anda bisa mengambil pesanan Anda di konter.
translations.sv: Du kan hämta din beställning vid disken.
translations.cs: Můžeš si vyzvednout objednávku u pultu.
translations.da: Du kan hente din bestilling ved disken.
translations.ja: カウンターで注文を受け取れます。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular of ‘pouvoir’; modal auxiliary governing the infinitive.
Infinitive verb complement of ‘peux’; here means ‘collect/pick up’ (an order).
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular possessor), feminine singular agreeing with ‘commande’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘retirer’.
Contraction of ‘à + le’; preposition introducing a locative complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘au’.

sentences.target: Il retire la pizza du four.

translations.fr: Il retire la pizza du four.
translations.en: He's taking the pizza out of the oven.
translations.de: Er nimmt die Pizza aus dem Ofen.
translations.pt: Ele tira a pizza do forno.
translations.vi: Anh ấy lấy bánh pizza ra khỏi lò.
translations.nl: Hij haalt de pizza uit de oven.
translations.hi: वह ओवन से पिज़्ज़ा निकाल रहा है.
translations.el: Βγάζει την πίτσα από τον φούρνο.
translations.nb: Han tar pizzaen ut av ovnen.
translations.sv: Han tar ut pizzan ur ugnen.
translations.da: Han tager pizzaen ud af ovnen.
translations.ja: 彼はオーブンからピザを取り出しています。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person singular subject pronoun (masculine).
Present indicative, 3rd person singular of the lexical verb ‘retirer’.
Definite article, feminine singular, determiners the noun ‘pizza’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘retire’.
Contraction of ‘de + le’; preposition marking source/origin.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘du’.

sentences.target: Nous retirons de l'argent au distributeur.

translations.fr: Nous retirons de l'argent au distributeur.
translations.en: We’re withdrawing money at the ATM.
translations.de: Wir heben Geld am Geldautomaten ab.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在从自动取款机取钱。
translations.pt: Estamos sacando dinheiro no caixa eletrônico.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang rút tiền tại máy ATM.
translations.ar: نحن نسحب المال من الصراف الآلي.
translations.nl: We halen geld uit de geldautomaat.
translations.hi: हम एटीएम से पैसे निकाल रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi tar ut penger i minibanken.
translations.sv: Vi tar ut pengar från bankomaten.
translations.ja: ATMでお金を引き出しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person plural subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 1st person plural of the lexical verb ‘retirer’.
Preposition forming a partitive construction with the elided article in ‘l’argent’.
Noun with elided definite article (l’); direct object in the partitive ‘de l’argent’ (‘some money’).
Contraction of ‘à + le’; preposition indicating location.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘au’ (here, an ATM).

We’re withdrawing money at the ATM.
